scripts.prebuild:client: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=client expo prebuild --platform android --clean
scripts.prebuild:owner: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=owner expo prebuild --platform android --clean
scripts.apk:client: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=client ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\ku4en\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk android\gradlew.bat -p android assembleDebug -PreactNativeArchitectures=armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a
scripts.apk:client:release: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=client ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\ku4en\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk android\gradlew.bat -p android assembleRelease -PreactNativeArchitectures=armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a
scripts.apk:owner: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=owner ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\ku4en\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk android\gradlew.bat -p android assembleDebug -PreactNativeArchitectures=armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a
scripts.apk:owner:release: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=owner ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\ku4en\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk android\gradlew.bat -p android assembleRelease -PreactNativeArchitectures=armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a
scripts.build:owner: npm run prebuild:owner && npm run apk:owner
scripts.build:owner:release: npm run prebuild:owner && npm run apk:owner:release
scripts.bundle: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=client ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\ku4en\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk android\gradlew.bat -p android bundleRelease -PreactNativeArchitectures=armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a
scripts.bundle:owner: npx cross-env EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_VARIANT=owner ANDROID_HOME=C:\Users\ku4en\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk android\gradlew.bat -p android bundleRelease -PreactNativeArchitectures=armeabi-v7a,arm64-v8a
